underlying_goal: Automate the discuss-phase workflow for a project planning system, minimize human-in-the-loop, ensure epistemic rigor, and conduct a massive literature review of ~8745 arxiv papers on agentic AI systems
friction_detail: 13 parallel agents overwhelmed arxiv with rate limiting causing most to fail; context window limits caused 2 agents to crash; initial launch didn't use correct model.
brief_summary: User wanted to scan ~8745 arxiv papers for relevant agentic AI research using parallel sub-agents; after initial failures from rate limiting and context limits, sequential reruns with sonnet successfully completed all 13 batches selecting ~1000+ relevant papers.
